changed_files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+dist: xenial
+language: python
+cache: pip
+
+matrix:
+  fast_finish: true
+  include:
+    - python: 3.5
+    - python: 3.6
+    - python: 3.7
+    - python: 3.8-dev
+
+install:
+  - pip install -U pip
+  - pip install -U pytest pytest-cov
+  - pip install -e .
+
+script:
+  - pytest --cov vimeo

@@ -33,7 +33,7 @@
 
     # Get the metadata response from the upload and log out the Vimeo.com url
     video_data = client.get(uri + '?fields=link').json()
-    print('"%s" has been uploaded to %s' % (file_name, video_data['link']))
+    print('"{}" has been uploaded to {}'.format(file_name, video_data['link']))
 
     # Make an API call to edit the title and description of the video.
     client.patch(uri, data={
@@ -46,7 +46,7 @@
 
     # Make an API call to see if the video is finished transcoding.
     video_data = client.get(uri + '?fields=transcode.status').json()
-    print('The transcode status for %s is: %s' % (
+    print('The transcode status for {} is: {}'.format(
         uri,
         video_data['transcode']['status']
     ))

@@ -1,3 +0,0 @@
-[bdist_wheel]
-# This flag says that the code is written to work on both Python 2 and Python 3. 
-universal=1

commit_summaries.message: Universal wheels are only for when supporting both Python 2 and 3
